rsvp.title: RSVP Submission
rsvp.description: Details about a guest's RSVP response.

guestName.description: The name of the primary guest.

attending.description: Whether the guest is attending the wedding.

guestsCount.description: The number of additional guests accompanying.

message.description: A congratulatory message to the couple.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the RSVP was submitted.

photo.title: Guest Gallery Photo
photo.description: A guest-uploaded photo and caption shared to the gallery.

guestName.description: The name of the guest who uploaded the photo.

photoUrl.description: The image source URL or base64 data string.

caption.description: Optional text caption for the photo.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the photo was uploaded.

/photos/{photoId}.description: Guest-shared wedding photos for the live gallery.
